title: VariantFlow: selective execution for VCF filtering, population summaries, and analytical export
description: VariantFlow is a selective-execution engine for post-calling VCF/BCF operations, including filtering, VCFtools-style population summaries, and Parquet export. It parses only the fields each query requires, preserves original records where possible, and tracks every performance claim against correctness-matched benchmarks. It includes a pixy-equivalent, missing-data-aware nucleotide diversity and divergence estimator validated to exact integer-count agreement with pixy. This release accompanies the VariantFlow Bioinformatics Application Note.
